displayName: Git Worktree Integration for Multi-Agent Parallel Execution

decisions.rationale: Simpler mental model — one parallel execution strategy with hard filesystem isolation
Resolver agent reads both task descriptions + conflict markers — more context than manual resolution
Preserve successful merges, abort only the failing one. No wasted work.
.cnogo/worktree-session.json checkpoints every phase. /resume detects interrupted sessions.
Bridge stays pure translator. Worktree module owns git operations and state file.
All agents share one SQLite file via symlink. WAL mode handles concurrent reads.
Conflict resolution is rare but high-stakes — worth the cost for best reasoning.
Standard ecosystem convention. Keeps main repo clean.
With worktree isolation, overlapping files don't block parallel execution — conflicts resolve at merge time.

constraints: Python stdlib only — subprocess.run for git operations
No concurrent SQLite writers — WAL mode + retry
Branch exclusivity — unique branch per worktree
Disk space — each worktree duplicates working tree
